Container.Name: PSFree
Container.Overview:
PSFree is a lightweight local web server for hosting the PSFree exploit
Best practice: • set br0 network mode • set Fixed IP address • set HTTP port to 80
This allows a simple redirect without a reverse proxy Set the original "manuals.playstation.net" to point to your PSFree IP
• AdGuard Home / Pi-hole: DNS rewrite → container IP • Firewall / Router (pfSense / OPNsense / ASUS etc..): DNS Host override (https://shorturl.at/Syx8T)
Then, on PS4, open Settings → User Guide and the exploit loads automatically

Config.Name: HTTP Port
Config.Description: HTTP port exposed by container (sets PORT env)
